title: Integrate with an existing PMM (Percona Monitoring) instance
scopeForThisChange: Option A only (link card + health ping). Option C deferred to v0.4 alongside the database module.
targetVersion: any (recommend A in v0.x, upgrade to C alongside v0.4 databases)

verification.vitest: 98/98 (90 baseline + 8 new — MON-1..MON-8 monitoring service tests)
verification.liveSmoke: verified 2026-05-18 against user's PMM at 192.168.199.234:18443 — GET /config null→200, PUT /config 200 + trailing-slash trim, GET /status ok:true latencyMs:57 (self-signed cert trusted), PUT bad URL → 400 MONITORING_INVALID_URL

originated: User detoured from v0.3 discussion 2026-05-18 — has PMM running on internal network on a custom HTTPS port
openQuestions: Sidebar entry placement: top-level vs nested under a future 監控 section?
Self-signed cert handling: skip verify for admin-configured PMM URL, or require fingerprint?
If we later upgrade A → C, do we keep A as a configure sub-page or rip-and-replace?
security: PMM admin password was shared in chat — NOT stored in repo or memory. Any future implementation must use a PMM API token / service account, not the admin password.
relatedChanges: v0.3-websites-acme (paused — this backlog is the detour that paused it)
v0.4 databases (future — natural home for option C)
